messages.content:
=You are a SaaS business evaluator. Score this idea on 8 criteria (0-10 each).

Idea: {{ $json.title }}
Source: {{ $json.source }}

Criteria:
1. market - market size (10=huge)
2. automation - how automatable with AI (10=fully automated)
3. pain - pain intensity (10=critical)
4. competition - competition level (10=no competition, 1=saturated)
5. willingnessToPay - willingness to pay (10=high)
6. margin - profit margin potential (10=90%+)
7. build - build complexity (10=very easy MVP)
8. timing - market timing (10=perfect now)

Respond ONLY with valid JSON:
{"market":7,"automation":8,"pain":6,"competition":5,"willingnessToPay":7,"margin":8,"build":7,"timing":6,"summary":"One sentence about this idea"}

parameters.query:
=INSERT OR IGNORE INTO ideas (title, source, source_url, score_composite, verdict, verdict_reason, score_market, score_automation, score_pain, score_competition, score_willingness_to_pay, score_margin, score_build, score_timing, discovered_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ $json.sourceUrl }}',
  {{ $json.scoreComposite }},
  '{{ $json.verdict }}',
  '{{ $json.verdictReason.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.scores.market }},
  {{ $json.scores.automation }},
  {{ $json.scores.pain }},
  {{ $json.scores.competition }},
  {{ $json.scores.willingnessToPay }},
  {{ $json.scores.margin }},
  {{ $json.scores.build }},
  {{ $json.scores.timing }},
  '{{ $json.discoveredAt }}'
);
=DELETE FROM ideas WHERE verdict IN ('KILL', 'FLIP') AND discovered_at < '{{ $json.cutoffDate }}';
